name: playful
description: Quirky designs with bright patterns, pop art influences, and fun poses that make you smile. This mood makes GAIA Print feel like wearable art — designs that spark conversations and bring joy to everyday outfits.

style.lighting: bright flat lighting | colorful gel accents | fun shadow play
style.color_grade: bright pop art palette | saturated primary colors with green base | high key fun
style.camera: fun posed portrait | overhead sticker scatter | dynamic model movement
style.composition: pop art inspired framing | sticker and design detail shots | playful model poses
style.props: bright stickers, quirky accessories, colorful backdrop, fun sunglasses, patterned socks

copy_tone: Fun and quirky with personality. Uses wordplay, unexpected descriptions, and cheeky humor. 'Your tote bag has more personality than most people.' Makes fashion feel like self-expression play.

music.mood: funky pop, retro synth, quirky indie

example_prompt_fragment: A fun lifestyle shot of a person laughing while holding up a colorful GAIA Print tote bag with a quirky plant-based design, bright pop art inspired background with green and gold patterns, playful pose, bright flat lighting with colorful gel accents, scattered stickers on the ground, high key saturated color palette, joyful pop art fashion photography
